top_signals.title: Bond Traders Finally Get Single View of Activity in UK Market

top_signals.title: Aeva 4D LiDAR selected for Bendix Class 8 safety systems
top_signals.summary:
Bendix and Aeva bring 4D LiDAR to Class 8 collision mitigation via Fusion ADAS. Collaboration targets L2+ driver assistance in mass production for fleets
